title: Anacamptis laxiflora
taxonomy: Anacamptis laxiflora is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Anacamptis and the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Orchideae. This species is native to the Mediterranean region and is often found growing in dry, rocky areas. The classification of Anacamptis laxiflora is also supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its slender stems and small, white flowers. Within the Orchidaceae family, Anacamptis laxiflora is often placed in the subgenus Anacamptis.
